title: Bump github.com/containers/buildah from 1.19.4 to 1.19.6
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/buildah](https://github.com/containers/buildah) from 1.19.4 to 1.19.6.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/buildah's releases.

v1.19.6

  • Bump c/containers/storage v1.24.6
  • Don't fail copy to emptydir
  • Workaround for RHEL gating test failure
  • Fix config-flags-verification test on F33
  • Fix bud capabilities test
  • Stop overriding the location of the blob info cache
  • Fix caching layers with build args
Changelog

Sourced from github.com/containers/buildah's changelog.

v1.19.6 (2021-02-18)

Bump c/containers/storage v1.24.6
Don't fail copy to emptydir
Workaround for RHEL gating test failure
Fix config-flags-verification test on F33
Fix bud capabilities test
Stop overriding the location of the blob info cache
Fix caching layers with build args

v1.19.5 (2021-02-09)

Vendor in latest containers/image and common
Commits
  • 7aedb16 Merge pull request #3022 from containers/buildah_v1.19.6
  • f938e05 Bulidah v1.19.6
  • dcd385e Merge pull request #3018 from containers/dev/tsweeney/store2_v1.24.6
  • 04b7a5f Bump c/containers/storage v1.24.6
  • 016b90d Merge pull request #3016 from containers/dev/tsweeney/emptydir_1.19
  • d37d51b Don't fail copy to emptydir - v1.19
  • e5384ed Merge pull request #3014 from cevich/bz1914884_backport
  • b55a038 Workaround for RHEL gating test failure
  • 3e7918f Fix config-flags-verification test on F33
  • 0a525bb Fix bud capabilities test
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

comments.body:
LGTM
assuming the F33 test ever gets happy
